prestazioni: Engine: L15B7 (1.5L Turbo DOHC i-VTEC) - Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (56 trim, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter from Milltek Performance for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors with a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (FPR) and a custom 3.5L surge tank from Ikeya Formula, fed by a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump to support 350+ HP on E85.

ECU & Tuning: Hondata FlashPro CTR (L15B7-specific) with a custom dyno-tuned map by Church Automotive Testing, targeting 22 psi peak boost on 93 octane (28 psi on E85) with a 2-step launch control set at 4,500 RPM and flat-foot shifting enabled via the K-Tuned shift knob with integrated rev-matching.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (Honda Vezel-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a 3-inch cowl scoop for intercooler ducting.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Honda HR-V/Vezel-specific) with custom valving for 15mm front and 20mm rear lowering, paired with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable).

Wheels & Aero: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 18x9.5 +35 (front) and 18x10.5 +40 (rear) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear). Rear diffuser from Varis Japan with integrated carbon fiber side skirts and a custom 1,200mm carbon fiber rear wing from 996 Racing.
